news.headline: Fed bids for 30-year tips total $907.1 mln.
GCU launches unique fundraising campaign to support community revitalization efforts, pioneering a five-point plan.
news.summary: Grand Canyon University in Phoenix announced a unique Five-Point Plan initiative, distinguishing it as the sole university nationally to implement such an approach. The university revealed its intention to kickstart a fundraising campaign, the first of its kind since its transition back to nonprofit status in 2018. The fundraising efforts are aimed at securing financial support for various initiatives.

news.headline: Baxter Q4 earnings beat expectations with EPS of 58 cents and sales of $2.75 billion, driven by strong performance in Medical Products & Therapies segment. Morgan Stanley maintains positive MedTech outlook.
news.summary: Baxter International Inc. (NYSE:BAX) exceeded expectations in the fourth quarter of 2024, reporting an adjusted EPS of 58 cents, surpassing both management guidance of 50-53 cents and Wall Street's estimate of 52 cents. The medical device company also saw a 1% year-over-year increase in sales, totaling $2.75 billion (+2% on a constant currency basis), which outperformed the consensus of $2.67 billion. This strong top-line performance was primarily attributed to better-than-expected sales in the Medical Products & Therapies and Pharmaceuticals segments. Meanwhile, Morgan Stanley remains optimistic about the MedTech sector in 2024, upgrading Intuitive Surgical and Stryker while downgrading Nevro and Glaukos. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Ukraine’s President Zelenskiy: Ukraine is ready for a security agreement with Trump.
BTC's market cools as capital inflows drop. Ethereum, Solana, and Memecoins also see corrections. Investor sentiment shifts.
news.summary: The market momentum of Bitcoin (BTC) is decreasing due to a weakening in capital inflows among various digital assets. Ethereum, Solana, and Memecoins are experiencing notable corrections as investor sentiment shifts. This trend highlights the changing dynamics within the digital asset market.

news.headline: Just Egg is now the most reliable egg as it fills gaps in the US supply chain. It is growing 5X faster than last year.
news.summary: Amid the Great American Egg Crisis causing widespread egg shortages in grocery stores and restaurants, Just Egg, a popular plant-based egg alternative, is playing a crucial role in addressing the gaps in the egg supply chain in the United States. With the outbreak of bird flu leading to increasing egg prices and limited availability, Just Egg has become a prominent option for the 94% of Americans who consume eggs daily. The demand for Just Egg has soared significantly, with the brand experiencing a growth rate that is five times faster this month compared to the same period last year.

news.headline: Ukraine’s President Zelenskiy: I had a productive meeting with the US Special Envoy to Ukraine Kellogg, we discussed effective security guarantees.
Entrepreneur Noah Beck becomes Co-Owner & Creative Director of Sown Again, reshaping essentials with quality.
news.summary: In a strategic move melding entrepreneurship and brand collaboration, a notable entrepreneur has joined forces with a renowned brand to revolutionize basics through superior artistry and enduring durability. Marking a significant development on February 20, 2025, in New York, Sown Again, the pioneer in minimalist apparel, joyfully announces the appointment of Noah Beck as Co-Owner and Creative Director. This partnership showcases the brand's commitment to innovation and unparalleled style, as they aim to enhance the blank clothing sector. Noah Beck, an acclaimed figure with a global following, brings his unique creative vision and expertise to this venture, promising to elevate the standards of the industry.

news.headline: Bitcoin down 6% in past month due to market fear of regulation; outperforming since early 2023. Scammers in panic mode.
news.summary: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has experienced a 6% decrease in value in the last month but is still in a macro bull market, surpassing other assets significantly since early 2023. Chart analyst Ali Martinez noted a pattern related to the SEC establishing a cyber and emerging technologies unit to tackle crypto fraud. Martinez believes the recent decline is due to market concerns about potential regulations, causing fear among scammers who are now in a state of panic.

news.headline: Holistic Moms Network joins KnoWEwell to continue mission; HMN active for 20+ years before partnership.
news.summary: In Bedminster, New Jersey, the Holistic Moms Network (HMN) has been promoting holistic living for over two decades, creating a nationwide community for families to connect and support each other. To adapt to changing circumstances, the HMN Board of Directors has chosen to dissolve the organization and collaborate with KnoWEwell, P.B.C. to sustain its mission. KnoWEwell, a global holistic well-being platform, will now take on the responsibility of continuing HMN's legacy.

news.headline: Former Janus Henderson analyst is accused of leading a work-from-home insider trading ring, per sources.
news.summary: A new report reveals that the global economic growth has been forecasted to increase by 6% in 2021, following a 3.5% decline in 2020 due to the pandemic. It is expected that the world GDP will reach $85.8 trillion this year. The economic recovery is uneven among countries, with advanced economies projected to grow by 5%, while emerging market and developing economies are expected to grow by 6.3%. However, the report warns of significant risks, including the possibility of new outbreaks and the uneven distribution of vaccines hindering the recovery process. It emphasizes the importance of international cooperation in ensuring a sustainable and inclusive economic recovery.

news.headline: Sean Hannity's interview with Trump and Musk on Fox News had 5.4M TV viewers, 20.5M video views on digital platforms.
news.summary: An interview featuring President Donald Trump and Elon Musk hosted by Sean Hannity received widespread attention, garnering over 20.5 million views on various digital platforms such as YouTube, TikTok, X, Instagram, and Facebook. The interview, which aired on Tuesday night, attracted 5.4 million viewers on television.

news.headline: BMO, LAFC, and ACFC release co-branded fan cards for offers & experiences, on Feb 20, 2025.
news.summary: BMO, along with Los Angeles Football Club (LAFC) and Angel City Football Club (ACFC), have unveiled the BMO LAFC Debit Mastercard® and BMO Angel City FC Debit Mastercard® to offer fans unique gameday deals and experiences. The announcement was made in Los Angeles on February 20, 2025. This partnership aims to provide exclusive benefits to fans through these debit cards.

news.headline: Fed's Musalem: It is important for productivity to attract global workers.
The Trump Administration opens a review into whether to rescind the $4 billion in grants awarded to the California high-speed rail project - Letter.
Vet Tix receives $150,000 donation, the largest ever, from Gary Sinise Foundation for 'Brothers After War'. Movie to be shown in Regal Cinemas on Feb 28.
news.summary: A generous donation of $150,000 will enable thousands of veterans, first responders, and their families to watch a new documentary free of charge. Produced by Gary Sinise and directed by Jake Rademacher, "Brothers After War" will hit Regal Cinemas nationwide on February 28. This initiative aims to provide a platform for these individuals to experience the film at no cost.

news.headline: Fed's Musalem: Sectors that are reliant on immigration may see labor shortages.
Fed official Musalem warns inflation may remain above 2%, highlighting rising risks.
Fed's Musalem: The banking system is strong and well-capitalized.
Tania Fonseca of D.Law reassures on immigrant worker protection under Trump's admin despite mass deportations.
news.summary: On January 20, Donald Trump assumed office as the 47th President of the United States and has initiated the enforcement of the promised "mass deportations." The current administration's efforts have sparked debates and raised concerns regarding immigration policies.

news.headline: Vizsla Silver updates technical report, as per news release on Feb. 20, 2025. NYSE: VZLA TSX: VZLA Frankfurt: 0G3 mentioned.
news.summary: Vancouver, BC - On February 20, 2025, Vizsla Silver Corp. (NYSE: VZLA, TSX: VZLA, Frankfurt: 0G3) shared that following a previous announcement on January 6, 2025, the Company has now submitted an independent technical report.

news.headline: Modera Inc. named the marketing agency for Blue Zones Health. Based in California, it will oversee various marketing aspects.
news.summary: In Orange, California on February 20, 2025, Modera Inc., a renowned healthcare marketing firm from Southern California, has been appointed as the official marketing agency of record (AOR) for Blue Zones Health. Responsible for managing consumer, broker, and other marketing endeavors, Modera will be handling all marketing strategies for Blue Zones Health.

news.headline: C&F Financial Corp raises quarterly dividend to 46 cents per share, a 5% increase from previous quarter's 44 cents.
news.summary: In Toano, Virginia, on February 20, 2025, the board of directors of C&F Financial Corporation (NASDAQ: CFFI) announced a regular cash dividend of 46 cents per share. The dividend will be paid out on April 1, 2025, to shareholders who are recorded as such on March 14, 2025. This marks a 5% rise from the previous quarter’s dividend of 44 cents per share.

news.headline: Fed's Musalem: We're working to align with Trump directives as appropriate, consistent with the law.
Century Communities to open Evergreen Grove in Chehalis, WA on Feb. 20, 2025. Offers rambler and two-story floor plans.
news.summary: Evergreen Grove, located in Chehalis, Washington, introduces a range of housing options including rambler and two-story floor plans. The community is developed by Century Communities, Inc., a prominent national homebuilder listed under NYSE: CCS. Recognized for their excellence in online home sales, Century Communities has been featured on prestigious lists such as America's Most Trustworthy Companies and World's Most Trustworthy.

news.headline: TMS International appoints Joel Hawthorne as new President and CEO, effective March 3, 2025, succeeding Raymond Kalouche.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, TMS International Corporation revealed the selection of Joel Hawthorne as the incoming President and Chief Executive Officer. Beginning his role on March 3, 2025, Hawthorne will take over from Raymond Kalouche in leading the company. This change in leadership marks a significant transition for TMS International Corporation.

news.headline: Tarkett Participation to make public buy-out offer for remaining shares in Tarkett as controlling shareholder.
news.summary: The parent company of Tarkett, Tarkett Participation, has revealed plans to initiate a public buy-out offer alongside a subsequent squeeze-out process for the remaining Tarkett shares it does not currently possess. This move signifies Tarkett Participation's intent to take full control of the company.

news.headline: Check out the new 'Functional Soda' trend in the soft drink industry. Learn more about its unique mission and impact.
Fed's Musalem: There's lots of risk in the economy right now on many fronts.
2024 results: Organic sales decline in tough market, but boosted EBITDA and margin. Increased free cash flow, lower debt.
Autoliv releases 2024 Annual & Sustainability Report, filed with SEC. Leader in auto safety systems.
news.summary: Autoliv, Inc., a global leader in automotive safety systems, headquartered in Stockholm, announced on February 20, 2025, that it has submitted its 2024 Annual Report on Form 10-K and its annual sustainability report to the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The company trades on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) under the ticker symbol ALV and on the Stockholm Stock Exchange (SSE) under the ticker ALIV.sdb. Autoliv's filings provide a comprehensive overview of its financial performance and sustainability initiatives for the year.

news.headline: STEM Greater Houston hosts STEM Fest offering 60+ activities for K-12 students to design, build, test. Innovate with STEM pros.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Houston, an event called STEM Fests has been organized by STEM Global Action (SGA). This event offers K-12 students over 60 STEM activities to design, build, and test. Alongside STEM professionals, students have the chance to innovate and create. The STEM Fest aims to provide young learners with hands-on experience in STEM fields.

news.headline: SEC reduces crypto enforcement, shifts focus to cyber fraud. New division will have 30 specialists led by Laura D'Allaird. Staff count reduced by 20.
news.summary: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission is adjusting its enforcement strategy by reorganizing its cryptocurrency oversight division. The restructured unit will now focus on combating cyber fraud and technological threats instead of solely monitoring cryptocurrency activities. This new division, led by Laura D'Allaird, will consist of 30 specialists, investigating crimes related to blockchain misuse, artificial intelligence, machine learning, and financial fraud driven by social media. This move entails a notable downsizing, with the new team operating with 20 fewer staff members compared to the previous cryptocurrency enforcement unit. The changes aim to enhance the SEC's capabilities in addressing evolving threats in the digital asset space.

news.headline: Fed's Musalem: Productivity speed up is reaching its trend, the question is if it will accelerate more.
Pool Corp reported Q4 earnings of 97 cents/share, beating estimates. Sales $987.48M (down 2% YoY). Gross profit $290.2M. Operating income $60.7M.
news.summary: Shares of Pool Corporation (NASDAQ:POOL) experienced an upward trend on Thursday following the company's fourth-quarter report. Pool Corporation posted adjusted earnings per share of 97 cents, surpassing expectations set at 90 cents by analysts. Despite a 2% year-over-year decrease in quarterly sales, which amounted to $987.48 million, the figure was higher than the anticipated $963.036 million. The gross profit for the period decreased by 1% to $290.2 million, yet the gross margin saw a slight increase of 10 basis points to 29.4%, up from 29.3% in the previous year. Operating income dropped by 24% to $60.7 million, and operating margin saw a 180-point decrease.

news.headline: Sherry Tevebaugh Brown, inspiration for MyDirectives digital ACP, passes away on Feb 11, 2025 after 40-year MS battle.
news.summary: In Dallas, MyDirectives, the top provider of digital advance care planning (ACP) tools, shared news of the passing of Sherry Tevebaugh Brown, mother of MyDirectives' president and CEO, Scott Brown. Mrs. Brown fought against multiple sclerosis for close to 40 years, serving as the motivation behind MyDirectives. She peacefully passed away in her sleep on February 11, 2025. Her passing reflects the core values that inspired the establishment of MyDirectives 18 years ago this month.

news.headline: Primary insider Christoph Baldegger of Hofseth Biocare ASA has increased personal shares to 3,247,976, approximately 0.82% of total A-shares.
news.summary: Christoph Baldegger, a key person and Board of Directors member at Hofseth BioCare ASA (HBC), previously owned 1,500,000 shares personally and had an additional 1,747,976 shares through the Bonafide fund. Following the fund's redemption, his indirect shares transferred to his personal account. As a result, Baldegger now directly holds 3,247,976 shares and no longer has any indirect stake in HBC. This holding constitutes about 0.82% of the total A-shares outstanding that carry voting rights.

news.headline: IQ AI introduces Agent Tokenization Platform (ATP) for DeFi, integrated with NEAR and Frax. Launch date: Feb. 20, 2025.
news.summary: Introducing a cutting-edge Agent Tokenization Platform (ATP) aimed at streamlining the Decentralized Finance (DeFi) sector and enabling users to create and oversee intelligent, autonomous agents seamlessly integrated with NEAR and Frax. This innovative platform, launched by IQ, promises to revolutionize DeFi operations. The development is based in Grand Cayman and was officially announced on February 20, 2025.

news.headline: Chicago Auto Show announces eighth annual What Drives Her award winners during Media Preview on Feb 6, 2025.
news.summary: In Chicago on Feb. 20, 2025, the Chicago Auto Show in collaboration with A Girls Guide to Cars hosted the eighth edition of the What Drives Her program at the Media Preview on Feb. 6. The event saw participation from industry experts nationwide for an engaging discussion.

news.headline: First yield-bearing stablecoin security approved by SEC in US. Figure Markets obtains go-ahead for interest-bearing stablecoin.
news.summary: Figure Markets has achieved the milestone of being the inaugural company to gain approval for an interest-bearing stablecoin in the United States, marking a significant development in the financial industry. This means that Figure Markets has successfully obtained regulatory clearance for a stablecoin that accrues interest, making it a pioneering achievement. It is important to note that this approval places Figure Markets at the forefront of innovation in the stablecoin sector within the country. This breakthrough underscores the growing importance and potential of stablecoins in the digital economy.

news.headline: IntouchCX named one of America's Dream Employers 2025 by Forbes and Statista Inc., among global brands.
news.summary: IntouchCX, a renowned company based in Winnipeg, Manitoba, has recently been recognized as one of America's Dream Employers 2025 by esteemed publications Forbes and Statista Inc. This recognition places them among an elite group of global brands that prioritize customer experience, trust and safety, back-office processing, and AI solutions in their operations. This accolade signifies IntouchCX's commitment to excellence and innovation in the workforce.

news.headline: LPL Financial partners with SUBSCRIBE to upgrade their alternative investment platform, enhancing private fund workflows.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in New York, a personalized alternative investments platform provided a leading independent wealth management firm with extensive capabilities to revolutionize their private fund investment processes. This platform stands out as one of the largest offerings in the country, enhancing the firm's digital transformation journey.

news.headline: Mortgage rates in the US decreased by 6.85% for the fifth consecutive week.
Guide for first-time voters in Germany's elections. Includes important facts and figures.
Amanda Crocker promoted to President at SWIVEL®.
news.summary: The latest report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 5.2%. This decrease translates to over 500,000 individuals finding employment opportunities in various sectors. Additionally, the report highlights a 2.3% increase in the GDP for the quarter, reflecting positive economic growth. In terms of inflation, there is a slight uptick to 2.7%, indicating a marginal increase in consumer prices. Overall, these statistics suggest a positive trend in the country's economic landscape, with more people being employed and the economy showing signs of growth.

news.headline: Podcast discusses ITAD with CXtec's Todd Zegers on ERI's show. Hosted by John Shegerian, CEO of ERI. Aimed at helping businesses understand ITAD landscape.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, the Impact Podcast with John Shegerian recently had Todd Zegers, CEO of CXtec, as a guest to discuss the current state of IT asset disposition (ITAD). Hosted by John Shegerian, the Co-Founder, Chairman, and CEO of ERI, a prominent IT and electronics asset disposition provider, the podcast was recognized with a Webby Award. CXtec, the company led by Zegers, was at the center of the conversation to help businesses navigate the evolving landscape of ITAD. The podcast provides valuable insights for companies looking to enhance their understanding of this critical aspect of IT management and disposal.

news.headline: Net Asset Value as at 31 Jan 2025 for Volta Finance Limited (VTA/VTAS) released in January 2025 monthly report.
news.summary: Volta Finance Limited (VTA / VTAS) has released its January 2025 monthly report. This information is not intended for release, distribution, or publication in whole or part in or into the United States.

news.headline: US Middle East Envoy Witkoff: Trump's Gaza plan is not an eviction plan for Palestinians.

Toast Inc (NYSE:TOST) reported Q4 revenue beat of $1.338 billion, driving analysts' optimism for 2025 growth. Analysts vary in rating and price targets. Sector Perfor maintained by RBC Capital Markets, Market Perform by Keefe Bruyette & Woods, and Buy by Needham with varying price targets. Financial Technology Solutions contributed $1,090 million in revenue, and Subscription Services added $200 million. Market responds with shares tanking in early trading. Read more on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Toast Inc (NYSE:TOST) saw a significant drop in shares during early trading on Thursday due to their mixed fourth-quarter results. Analysts had differing opinions on the situation.RBC Capital Markets analyst Daniel Perlin confirmed a Sector Perform rating. Meanwhile, Keefe Bruyette & Woods analyst Sanjay Sakhrani kept a Market Perform rating but raised the price target from $40 to $42. Needham analyst Mayank Tandon retained a Buy rating with a price target of $50.According to Perlin, Toast reported revenues totaling $1.338 billion and adjusted EBITDA of $111 million. This surpassed the Street's expectations of $1.318 billion in revenue and $101 million in adjusted EBITDA. Perlin noted that Financial Technology Solutions contributed $1,090 million in revenue, while Subscription Services added $200 million.For more analyst ratings and detailed information, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: American Foundation for Suicide Prevention organizes Out of the Darkness Campus Walks in Illinois to combat suicide.
news.summary: In a concerted effort against suicide, various high school and college communities in Illinois are uniting to participate in the Out of the Darkness Campus Walk. This event will bring together students, faculty, and staff members to raise awareness and support suicide prevention initiatives. Scheduled for February 20, 2025, in Chicago, this initiative aims to promote mental health and well-being among individuals aged 14 to 24. With the participation of numerous schools, the event is set to attract a large number of attendees, emphasizing the importance of collective action in combating suicide.
